column3: Purpose
column5: Key notes

column3: Animate HTML, SVG, WebGL values, motion values, or JavaScript objects.
column4:
import { animate } from "motion"
animate(".box", { opacity: 1, y: 0 })
column5: Pass a selector, element, element collection, motion value, or object.

column3: Animate through multiple values for a property.
column5: Keyframes are arrays. Use times and ease arrays for per-segment control.

column3: Run multiple animation segments in sequence or at scheduled offsets.
column5: Each segment is [target, values, options].

column3: Create natural physics-based movement.
column5: Physics springs commonly use stiffness, damping, and mass.

column3: Offset the delay of animations across multiple elements.
column4:
import { animate, stagger } from "motion"
animate(".item", { opacity: 1 }, { delay: stagger(0.08) })
column5: Useful for lists, grids, menus, and loaders. Supports from: "first", "center", "last", or an index.

column3: Run callbacks when an element enters or leaves a viewport.
column4:
import { animate, inView } from "motion"
inView(".card", el => animate(el, { opacity: 1 }))
column5: Options include root, margin, and amount. Returns a stop function.

column3: Link animation progress or callbacks directly to scroll progress.
column4:
import { animate, scroll } from "motion"
scroll(animate(".bar", { scaleX: [0, 1] }))
column5: Use for progress indicators, parallax, and scroll-linked effects.

column3: Detect reliable hover start/end gestures and filter emulated touch hover.
column5: Callback may return a hover-end handler. Returns a cleanup function.

column3: Detect pointer or keyboard press start/end gestures.
column5: Includes keyboard support and secondary-pointer filtering.

column3: Declaratively animate React elements.
column4:
import { motion } from "motion/react"
<motion.div animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} />
column5: Replace an HTML/SVG tag with its motion equivalent.

column3: Define an entry state, target state, and timing.
column4:
<motion.div
  initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 12 }}
  animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
  transition={{ duration: 0.25 }}
/>
column5: Set initial={false} to disable the initial enter animation.

column3: Animate temporarily while a pointer gesture is active.
column5: Also available: whileFocus, whileDrag, and whileInView.

column3: Keep removed children mounted long enough to play exit animations.
column5: Exiting children need stable, unique keys.

column3: Animate layout changes and shared-element transitions.
column5: layout can also be "position" or "size". Matching layoutId values create shared transitions.

column3: Expose page or element scroll position and progress as motion values.
column4:
const { scrollYProgress } = useScroll()
return <motion.div style={{ scaleX: scrollYProgress }} />
column5: Common outputs: scrollX, scrollY, scrollXProgress, scrollYProgress.

column3: Create a manually controlled animation value without React re-renders.
column4:
const x = useMotionValue(0)
return <motion.div style={{ x }} />
column5: Use get(), set(), events, and composition with other motion-value hooks.

column3: Map one or more motion values into new values.
column5: Supports transform functions and input/output value maps.

column3: Adapt animation behavior to the user’s reduced-motion preference.
column4:
const reduce = useReducedMotion()
const y = reduce ? 0 : 20
column5: Prefer opacity or no movement when reduced motion is requested.

column3: Description
column5: Notes

column3: Independent translation transforms.
column5: Prefer for movement instead of left/top.

column3: Scale an element uniformly or by axis.
column5: Useful for hover, press, and emphasis.

column3: Rotate an element.
column5: Numbers are generally interpreted as degrees.

column3: Fade an element.
column5: One of the safest properties for smooth animation.

column3: Animate a complete CSS transform string.
column5: Use when hardware acceleration is critical.

column3: Interpolate supported colors.
column5: Can be more rendering-intensive than transform or opacity.

column3: Animate SVG line drawing.
column5: Apply to SVG path elements.

column3: Animation duration in seconds.
column5: Typical UI micro-interactions are brief.

column3: Wait before starting, in seconds.
column5: May also be supplied by stagger().

column3: Tween timing curve.
column5: Named easing, cubic-bezier array, function, or per-keyframe array.

column3: Select tween, spring, or inertia behavior.
column5: Hybrid animate supports "tween", "spring", and "inertia".

column3: Spring strength; higher values move more abruptly.
column5: Used with physics-based springs.

column3: Opposing force that reduces oscillation.
column5: A value of zero allows indefinite oscillation.

column3: Mass of the moving object.
column5: Higher values feel heavier and more sluggish.

column3: Bounciness for duration-based springs.
column5: Ranges from 0 to 1; overridden by physics parameters.

column3: Number of additional repetitions.
column5: Use Infinity for continuous animation.

column3: How repetitions behave.
column5: Values: "loop", "reverse", or "mirror".

column3: Position each keyframe within total progress.
column5: Array length must match the keyframe count.

column3: Control when in-view detection triggers.
column5: amount accepts "some", "all", or a number from 0 to 1.

column3: Minimize layout and paint work for smoother animation.
column5: Test heavier properties on low-powered devices.

column3:
<motion.button className="btn btn-primary"
  whileHover={{ scale: 1.03 }}
  whileTap={{ scale: 0.97 }}
/>
column4: Subtle feedback for buttons; keep scale changes small.

column3:
<motion.div className="card bg-base-200"
  initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 16 }}
  animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
/>
column4: Use for cards entering a page or filtered result list.

column3:
<AnimatePresence>
  {open && <motion.div className="modal modal-open"
    initial={{ opacity: 0 }} animate={{ opacity: 1 }} exit={{ opacity: 0 }} />}
</AnimatePresence>
column4: AnimatePresence enables the closing transition before unmount.
column5: https://motion.dev/docs/react-animate-presence

column3:
animate(".list-row", { opacity: [0, 1], y: [8, 0] },
